zh.Briey,Meurthe-Et-Moselle,France: 法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒布利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne d'Aspremont Dame de Wassigny於1250年出生在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒布利時，她的父親Simon I. von Sponheim43歲，母親Margarete von Hengebach34歲。她於1272年與Friedrich IV von Leiningen結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1321年1月17日之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne d'Aspremont Dame de Wassigny于1250年出生在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒布利时，她的父亲Simon I. von Sponheim43岁，母亲Margarete von Hengebach34岁。她于1272年与Friedrich IV von Leiningen结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1321年1月17日之后。

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne d'Aspremont Dame de Wassigny was born in 1250, in Briey, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, her father, Simon I. von Sponheim, was 43 and her mother, Margarete von Hengebach, was 34. She married Friedrich IV von Leiningen in 1272. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died after 17 January 1321.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne d'Aspremont Dame de Wassigny est née en 1250, à Briey, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Simon I. von Sponheim, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Margarete von Hengebach, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Friedrich IV von Leiningen en 1272. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 17 janvier 1321.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne d'Aspremont Dame de Wassigny 1250 in Briey, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon I. von Sponheim 43 und ihre Mutter Margarete von Hengebach 34. Sie hat 1272 Friedrich IV von Leiningen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 17. Januar 1321.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne d'Aspremont Dame de Wassigny è nata il nel 1250 nel Briey, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Simon I. von Sponheim, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Margarete von Hengebach, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Friedrich IV von Leiningen nel 1272. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 17 gennaio 1321.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne d'Aspremont Dame de Wassignyが1250年にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルブリーイで生まれた時，父Simon I. von Sponheimは43歳，母Margarete von Hengebachは34歳であった。1272年にFriedrich IV von Leiningenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1321年1月17日以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne d'Aspremont Dame de Wassigny(이)가 1250년 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 브리이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon I. von Sponheim(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margarete von Hengebach(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1272년 Friedrich IV von Leiningen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1321년 1월 17일 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne d'Aspremont Dame de Wassigny nasceu em 1250, em Briey, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Simon I. von Sponheim, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Margarete von Hengebach, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Friedrich IV von Leiningen em 1272. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 17 de janeiro de 1321.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne d'Aspremont Dame de Wassigny родилась в 1250 г. в местности брии, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Simon I. von Sponheim было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Margarete von Hengebach, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Friedrich IV von Leiningen в 1272 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 17 январь 1321 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne d'Aspremont Dame de Wassigny nació en 1250, en Briey, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Simon I. von Sponheim, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Margarete von Hengebach, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Friedrich IV von Leiningen en 1272. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió después de 17 de enero de 1321.
